summary: Iteration 127: Year Projection Calculation Fix - VERIFIED. Bug: Year 1 projection showed $44,943 instead of ~$12,414. Fix: Backend now returns BOTH 'projections' (forward from today) and 'license_year_projections' (from start date). Frontend displays both types with different color schemes (cyan for License Year End, blue for Forward Projections). All backend API tests pass and frontend displays correctly.

issues: Console warnings about DialogContent missing DialogTitle for accessibility

critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent accessibility warning - should add DialogTitle for screen readers (minor)
Projection calculations look correct - quarterly compounding formula verified in both backend and frontend
seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing licensee test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Year projection fix verified. Backend /api/profit/licensee/year-projections now returns both 'projections' (from current_value) and 'license_year_projections' (from starting_amount at effective_start_date). Frontend Dashboard displays both types - License Year End in cyan, Forward Projections in blue. Bar chart uses License Year End data. The fix resolves the bug where projections were incorrectly calculated from current balance instead of starting amount.

verified_fix_details.bug_description: Year 1 projection showed wrong value - was calculating from today's balance instead of effective start date
verified_fix_details.fix_approach: Show BOTH projection types - License Year End (from start) and Forward Projections (from today)

new_response_fields: projections - forward from current_value with quarter_breakdown

frontend_changes.display: Two separate rows with different colors (cyan for License Year End, blue for Forward)

profit_tracker_changes.fix: generateMonthlyProjection uses quarterly fixed daily profit - recalculates only at quarter boundaries
